name: Get PHI Branch Zips from LP

content.query:
select
'PHI' as OpCo
,brz.id as BranchZipID
,brz.[zip]
,brz.[brn_id] as BranchID
,brn.LongName as Branch
,brn.Active
,brz.[prg_id] as ProductGroupID
,prg.Descr as ProductGroup
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_PHI_brz_BranchZips] brz
,[ODS].[LP_PHI_brn_Branches] brn
,[ODS].[LP_PHI_prg_Product_Groups] prg
WHERE
brz.brn_id = brn.id
and brz.prg_id = prg.id
order by 
BranchID, 
Zip,
ProductGroupID
